description: Normalize document deduplication via directory-name-first doc_id extraction

root_cause.issue: Duplicate document entries in build_manifest (50 entries)
root_cause.mechanism: extract_report_numbers() finds CITED report numbers (bibliographies, 'previously issued' lists) before actual document metadata, causing incorrect doc_id assignment
root_cause.example: Directory ORNL-TM-0732 had doc_id=ornl-tm-728 because text contained 'ORNL-TM-728' in bibliography before its own number

fix_details.strategy: Prioritize directory name as canonical source when pattern matches known report number formats
fix_details.normalization: Strip leading zeros from report numbers (ORNL-0528 -> ornl-528)
fix_details.patterns: Extended regex to match compound prefixes (ORNL-TM-XXXX, ORNL-CF-XX-XX-XXX)

remaining_duplicates: oak-ridge-national-laboratory x2 (ORNL Review issues without report numbers)

commands: python3 -c "import json; from collections import Counter; ids = json.load(open('kb/manifests/incremental_build_manifest.json')).get('recompiled_doc_ids', []); dups = {k:v for k,v in Counter(ids).items() if v > 1}; print(f'Duplicates: {len(dups)} groups, {sum(v-1 for v in dups.values())} entries')"

next_steps: Consider FFR chapter normalization (chapters share book-level metadata, not individual report numbers)
Add ORNL-Review report number extraction patterns
Investigate ornl-5132 / ornl-tm-5920 duplicate report number conflict
